status: DRAFT — pending directors' resolution; not yet anchored
raw_check_policy: chain_integrity_shift_events is NEVER filtered — it stays RED while any listed event exists. chain_integrity_shift_events_ex_baseline is the operational signal.

PILOT_SPEC_FLUX.explanation: spec_version 0 events written 2026-04-30..2026-05-11 while the WLES hash specification was in flux pre-v1.0-cutover (cutover 2026-06-04). Mismatch is a documented historical artefact of the spec change, not tampering. CHAIN_BREAK alerts for these events have fired daily since 2026-04-28 and remain on the immutable record (504 alert rows at adoption time).

PENDING_ATTRIBUTION.explanation: NOT excluded by the ex-baseline check. Listed for visibility only, per the spine ruling (root-cause before baselining). Root-cause finding 2026-06-12: NOT a writer or checker defect — five sibling EXPORT_RECORD events (same created_by, incl. 2026-06-05) verify GREEN. This event is a foreign, unsealed synthetic insert: all-9s worker/shift ids, receipt FSTR-M4MINT01, written 2026-06-06T04:53Z via service role, no trace in the repository. The detector flagged it the day it was written — working as designed. Awaiting founder attribution; if confirmed as a deliberate test mint, move to class SYNTHETIC_TEST_FIXTURE with the confirmation recorded; if unattributable, escalate as a security finding.

adoption.anchoring: After adoption, register the SHA-256 of this file as a substrate_anchors row so the exceptions list is covered by the anchor_fingerprint check and cannot be quietly amended.
